title: Braxis
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Braxis.jpg]] |name=Braxis |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Pho Ph'eahian]]{{CSWECite|I|92|Braxis}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]][[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] **[[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm sorry, Senator Braxis—The Imperial throne cannot interfere with local politics.''"
"''But you promised—|Galactic Emperor Palpatine and Senator Braxis speaking via hologram|}} '''Braxis''' was a [[Pho Ph'eahian]] who served in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] during the early [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Senator/Legends|senator]] spoke to the newly declared head of the Empire, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the declaration of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], while the latter was on the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the exchange, Braxis sought aid for the [[Unidentified planet (Braxis)|planet]] he represented, which Palpatine had previously promised him, though the Emperor denied the aid on the grounds that he could not intervene in local [[Politics/Legends|politics]]. Braxis protested, but was cut off before he could finish as the Emperor turned off the hologram. ==Behind the scenes== Braxis first appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' in the [[Dark Times 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''Path to Nowhere'']] story arc published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[November 8]], [[2006]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54075/star_wars_dark_times_2006_1|text=Star Wars: Dark Times (2006) #1}} The comic was written by Mick Harrison, a pen name of [[Randy Stradley]],{{InsiderCite|127|Blaster}} and was illustrated by [[Douglas Wheatley]]. ==Appearances== *[[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] {{1st}} {{Hologram}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Braxis |pl=Braxis }} [[Category:Galactic Empire senators]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Pho Ph'eahians]]
